message:
fix(version): validate ldflags injection to prevent empty version output (#126)

The v0.14.4 release binary output just "bv" without a version number
because GoReleaser's {{.Version}} template resolved to an empty string,
which was injected directly into the exported Version variable,
bypassing all fallback logic.

Root cause: the old code injected into the exported `Version` var via
ldflags. An empty injection silently overwrote the default value, and
since `Version` was already set (to ""), the init() fallback never ran.

Fix:
- Validate the ldflags-injected value with isUsableVersion() to reject
  empty strings, bare "v" prefixes, and whitespace-only values
- Normalize the accepted value (trim whitespace, ensure "v" prefix)
- Add a defensive final guard ensuring Version is never empty after
  all three fallback tiers resolve
- Add version_test.go with regression tests for all edge cases

Closes #126

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
